name: buckets
description: Manage buckets — creates a new bucket, restores a soft-deleted bucket, initiates a long-running relocate bucket operation on the specified bucket. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: predefinedAcl
parameters.description: Apply a predefined set of access controls to this bucket.

parameters.name: predefinedDefaultObjectAcl
parameters.description: Apply a predefined set of default object access controls to this bucket.

parameters.name: projection
parameters.description: Set of properties to return. Defaults to noAcl, unless the bucket resource specifies acl or defaultObjectAcl properties, when it defaults to full.

parameters.name: userProject
parameters.description: The project to be billed for this request.

parameters.name: enableObjectRetention
parameters.description: When set to true, object retention is enabled for this bucket.
